33:       --elev-flat: none;

36: 
37:       --motion-fast: 150ms;
38:       --motion-base: 220ms;
39:       --ease-standard: cubic-bezier(0.28, 0, 0.22, 1);
40:     }
41: 
42:     *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
43:     @keyframes fadeSlideIn {
44:       from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
45:       to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
46:     }
47:     html, body { margin: 0; height: 100%; }
48:     body {
49:       background: var(--dark-bg);
50:       color: var(--fg);
51:       font-family: var(--font-body);
52:       font-size: 18px;
53:       line-height: 1.5;
54:       -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
55:       display: flex;
56:       overflow-x: auto;
57:       overflow-y: hidden;
58:       scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
59:       scroll-behavior: smooth;
60:     }
61:     body::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
62:     p { text-wrap: pretty; }
63:     h1, h2, h3 { text-wrap: balance; }
64: 
65:     .slide {
66:       flex: 0 0 100vw;
67:       width: 100vw;
68:       height: 100vh;
69:       scroll-snap-align: start;
70:       padding: clamp(48px, 7vw, 96px) clamp(48px, 8vw, 112px);
71:       display: flex;
72:       flex-direction: column;
73:       justify-content: center;
74:       position: relative;
75:       overflow: hidden;
76:     }
77:     .slide > * { animation: fadeSlideIn 0.6s var(--ease-standard) both; }
78:     .slide > *:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
79:     .slide > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
80:     .slide > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
81:     .slide > *:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
82:     .slide > *:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
83:     .slide > *:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.6s; }
84: 
85:     .slide.light { background: var(--bg); color: var(--fg); }
86:     .slide.dark  { background: var(--dark-bg); color: var(--light-text); }
87:     .slide.dark .muted    { color: rgba(245,245,247,0.65); }
88:     .slide.dark .border   { border-color: rgba(245,245,247,0.18); }
89:     .slide.hero { padding-block: clamp(64px, 9vw, 128px); }
90:     .slide.center { align-items: center; text-align: center; justify-content: center; }
91:     .slide.center .body { margin-inline: auto; }
92: 
93:     .eyebrow {
94:       font-family: var(--font-mono);
95:       font-size: 12px;
96:       letter-spacing: 0.1em;
97:       text-transform: uppercase;
98:       color: var(--accent);
99:       margin: 0 0 28px;
100:     }
101:     .slide.light .eyebrow { color: var(--fg); }
102:     .slide.light .eyebrow span { color: var(--accent); }
103:

106:       font-size: clamp(56px

Simplify slide layouts — remove excess chrome, tighter copy
Add scroll-triggered parallax and staggered micro-animations

events.content: [{"content":"Rewrite CSS with cleaner minimal styling and advanced animations","status":"completed","priority":"high"},{"content":"Simplify slide layouts — remove excess chrome, tighter copy","status":"completed","priority":"high"},{"content":"Add scroll-triggered parallax and staggered micro-animations","status":"completed","priority":"high"},{"content":"Verify all animations work and deck is responsive","status":"completed","priority":"medium"}]

events.delta:
Hecho — `evidguard-pitch-deck.html` actualizado con dos mejoras clave:

**Minimalista:** sin borders dashed en el logo, sin hint text, sin bullets decorativos, tipografía más limpia, líneas de acento finas como único adorno visual.

**Animaciones profesionales:** cada slide tiene 4 capas de entrada con `revealUp` escalonadas (0.05s → 0.2s → 0.3s → 0.45s), el número grande (94%) escala con `revealScale`, el contador rebota con `counterPop` al cambiar de slide, la barra de progreso tiene un shimmer animado, y las easing curves son Apple-style (`cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)`) para un movimiento que se siente físico, no lineal.
